hero.intro: Third-year CSE student building modern, scalable, AI-powered web applications - React and Next.js front ends, LLM and RAG integrations via LangChain, and clean, usable design.

intro.description: I build modern, scalable, and AI-powered web applications with a focus on performance, usability, and clean design.

websiteSection.designedBy: This portfolio showcases my projects, technical skills, and experience in frontend development and AI integration.
websiteSection.futurePlans: I aim to deepen my expertise in system design, scalable architectures, and AI-powered applications.
websiteSection.codeStory: My journey in tech started with curiosity about how things work. Over time, it evolved into building real-world applications, contributing to communities, and exploring cutting-edge AI technologies.
